nasb.text: Now in the neighborhood of that place were lands belonging to the leading man of the island, named Publius, who welcomed us and entertained us courteously three days.

esv.text: Now in the neighborhood of that place were lands belonging to the chief man of the island, named Publius, who received us and entertained us hospitably for three days.

cnv.text: 那地附近有些田產，是島上的首領部百流所擁有的。他歡迎我們，善意招待我們三天。

ccb.text: 那个岛的首领名叫部百流，他的田产就在附近。他接待我们，热情款待了我们三天。

csbs.text: 在那个地方附近，有些田产是岛上首领普布利乌的。他欢迎我们，热情地招待了我们三天。
